packs.title: Easy
packs.subtitle: Familiar, concrete, and personal
packs.description: Best for warm-ups, general speaking, and familiar life topics.

packs.title: Medium
packs.subtitle: Practical, school/work, and world
packs.description: A step up for practical communication and broader world topics.

packs.title: Advanced
packs.subtitle: Broader social and analytical
packs.description: Useful for richer opinions, explanation, and analytical speaking.

packs.title: Advanced Debate
packs.subtitle: Abstract, sensitive, and controversial
packs.description: Best for high-level discussion, argument, nuance, and sensitive issues.

topics.title: How Long Does It Take, Time
